Serving Tampa · St. Pete · Clearwater · Brandon · Lakeland & All of Tampa Bay

What We Do

🚛

Junk Removal

We load it, haul it, and dispose of it properly. Furniture, appliances, yard waste, construction debris — all of it.

🏚️

Demolition

Sheds, mobile homes, additions, garages. We bring the equipment and leave the lot clean.

🏠

Property Cleanouts

Estates, foreclosures, rentals. If it needs to be cleared out, we handle it fast and with respect.

🔨

Interior Demo

Kitchens, bathrooms, flooring — we gut it and haul it so your contractor can get to work.

🌿

Yard & Storm Debris

After a storm or a big cleanup, we'll get rid of branches, brush, and whatever else is piling up.

⚡

Same-Day Available

Call in the morning, we can usually be there the same day. We stay flexible because life doesn't wait.

We Show Up

We say we'll be there, we're there. Simple as that.

Demo Work
✝ Our Mission

We Work For God

When we started Rush Removal, we made a decision — we were going to run this company the right way. That means being honest with every customer, working hard on every single job, and treating people the way we'd want to be treated.

Our faith is the foundation of everything we do. It keeps us accountable and pushes us to give every job our full effort.

"Whatever you do, work at it with all your heart, as working for the Lord, not for human masters." — Colossians 3:23

Two Brothers, One Truck

We started Rush Removal because we saw people getting overcharged and underserved. We're from here — Tampa Bay born and raised — and we wanted to build something we were proud of in our own backyard.

Between the two of us, we've done hundreds of jobs across Hillsborough, Pinellas, and Pasco counties. From single-item pickups to full mobile home demos, we've handled it all. We bring our own equipment, we don't subcontract, and you always know who's showing up.

We're not a call center or a franchise. When you call Rush Removal, you're talking to the owners. That's how we like it.

Florida Born & Raised Family Owned Fully Insured Same-Day Available No Subcontractors Faith-Based Business
Service Area:  Tampa · St. Petersburg · Clearwater · Brandon · Riverview · Lakeland · Sarasota · New Port Richey · and surrounding areas
